title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF BUGANG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PIO V. CORPUS, PROVINCE OF MASBATE, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO BUGANG.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4823 / 53 OG No. 15, 4784 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1672, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF BUGANG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PIO V. CORPUS, PROVINCE OF MASBATE, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO BUGANG.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Bugang in the Municipality of Pio V. Corpus, Province of Masbate, is hereby converted into a barrio to be known as barrio Bugang.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
